opportunities.name: IRA PWA audit-defense and penalty-remediation

opportunities.name: Specialty-insurance MGA for Li-ion and BESS commercial fire risk
opportunities.problem_category: Underwrite and place emerging hard-to-place lithium-ion and battery-energy-storage commercial fire risk via an MGA owning distribution, the underwriting transaction, and accruing loss data
opportunities.reasoning: Legacy OPP-008. 58 ARCHIVE (ADR-019); first OWNED-POSITION play, passed strip-out-the-AI screen but capped at vacuum check: NARDAC/Amwins 50M 8 Lloyds syndicates + Travelers + BikeInsure; market softening into 2026; AI underwriting commoditized; loss-data moat is cold-start; needs regulated capital. 8th cap; passing ADR-018 necessary NOT sufficient.
